title: Battle Royale
description: ⚔️ Any World Battle Royale | Vanilla compatible | 🏰 Lobby | 🎛️ Custom Rules | 🌍 Shrinking Border | 🔄 Fresh Maps
body:
# 🏹 Survival Games Datapack

Turn any Minecraft world into a fully playable **Hunger Games / Survival Games arena** in seconds.

This datapack handles the setup for you: spreading players, managing the game area, shrinking the border, and giving you simple in-game options to customize each match.

## ⚔️ What is this?

This pack lets you instantly create a Survival Games style match in your world.

Players are spread across the map, then pushed closer together by a shrinking world border. The match can last **30 minutes or more**, depending on your settings.

Perfect for:

- 🎮 Friend groups
- 🏰 Minecraft servers
- 🏆 Events and tournaments
- 🔁 Repeatable mini-game sessions

## ✨ Features

- 🧭 **Automatic player spreading**
- 🌍 **Shrinking world border**
- ⏱️ **30+ minute matches**
- 📍 **Toggle coordinates**
- ❤️ **Toggle UHC mode**
- 👥 **Toggle teams**
- 📦 **Loot crates**
- 🛠️ **Moderator-only controls**
- 🔄 **Map re-generation support**

## 🗺️ Fresh map every match

Want every round to feel different?

This pack supports map re-generation by moving the entire playing area. That means you can run multiple matches in the same world without always using the same terrain.

New match, new arena, less repetition.

## 📦 Installation

Place the datapack, **unzipped**, inside your world's `datapacks` folder.

Then load the world and run:

```mcfunction
/function sg:triggers/init
